name: Shrimp Spiedini with Pesto, New Potatoes & Chickpea Aioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes with skins on until tender, then drain and cool.
2. Peel shrimp, leaving head and tail piece on. Thread 7 each onto bamboo skewers.
3. Season with salt and pepper and refrigerate.
4. Preheat barbecue.
5. Cut new potatoes into quarters and place in mixing bowl.
6. In blender, grind pine nuts, basil leaves, garlic, Parmesan, Pecorino, and 1/2 cup olive oil until very fine (about 45 seconds). Add remaining oil in drizzle to form smooth yet thick sauce and set aside.
7. In another processor, blend chickpeas, mint, lemon juice, egg, garlic, and half cup of olive oil until smooth (1 minute).
8. Slowly drizzle in remaining oil to create a creamy sauce.
9. Dress the potatoes with half the pesto and place in center of one of 4 plates.
10. Grill spiedini for 3 minutes per side and place on each plate. Cover shrimp with remaining pesto and drizzle with aioli.
Yield: 4 servings
